As an immigrant, I have seen firsthand how important it is to take care of one's health, especially during these uncertain times. Here are some tips that I have learned over the years:
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: My opinions on this topic are informed by my personal experiences and values. As a creative person, I believe in expressing myself through art and music. However, when it comes to discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines, I prioritize accuracy and evidence-based information. I have found that listening actively and empathetically can go a long way in building trust and understanding.
